nav.logoAlt: EcoDrones Community — drone technology for reforestation

footer.description: Community of pilots and volunteers using drones to reforest the planet. Goal: 100 million native trees planted.
footer.author: Rafael F. M. Guillen — CEO & Founder
footer.seo: Reforestation Drone · Automated Planting · Sustainable Agriculture

hero.body: Earn guaranteed extra income feeding the world. Join the abundance.

manifesto.body1: We are a community of pilots, scientists and visionaries operating swarms of autonomous drones to regenerate ecosystems at a planetary scale.
manifesto.body2: We don't wait for policies. We don't depend on promises. We plant, we monitor and we give back.

urgencia.blockquote: Thousands of people die every year due to floods and landslides caused by the absence of adequate vegetation cover.
urgencia.problem2Desc: Absence of roots compromises soil stability
urgencia.problem3Desc: Cities without greenery retain up to 10°C more heat
urgencia.problem4Desc: Lack of vegetation reduces CO₂ and particle absorption
urgencia.problem5Desc: Urban infrastructure can't handle rainfall volumes
urgencia.problem6Desc: Destroyed habitats eliminate species and pollinators
urgencia.solutionTitle: Nature already has the most efficient engineering system on the planet.
urgencia.solutionBody: The EcoDrones mission is to reintegrate nature into urban infrastructure with coordinated technology — drones, AI and community working together to scale what nature already knows how to do.

inspiracao.imageLabel: Nature as a model · EcoDrones Community
inspiracao.quote: Technology doesn't replace nature. It learns from it. More trees mean more life.
inspiracao.feature2: Expansion of urban and rural green areas
inspiracao.bottom: More trees = more life. The equation is simple.

ecossistema.card1Desc: Volunteer pilots operating drones for precision aerial seeding.
ecossistema.card2Desc: Planting native species in degraded areas, identified with community support.
ecossistema.card3Desc: Open network of pilots, environmentalists and supporters building the movement together.
ecossistema.card4Desc: Donations and partnerships that fund seeds, equipment and field operations.

comoFunciona.heading: How Automated Drone Planting Works
comoFunciona.subhead: An infinite cycle of regeneration, income and abundance — powered by technology and nature.
comoFunciona.step1Desc: Biome and climate data define the ideal mix
comoFunciona.step3Title: Drones execute planting in the Golden Window
comoFunciona.step4Desc: AI tracks every geolocated planting point
comoFunciona.step5Desc: Harvesting drone with articulated mechanical arms
comoFunciona.step6Desc: Monthly payment validated for each confirmed action
comoFunciona.footer: ∞ The cycle feeds itself — the more you plant, the more you receive

ecossistemaImpacto.pillar1Desc: Large-scale biome recovery through an army of autonomous drones coordinated by the app.
ecossistemaImpacto.pillar2Desc: Production of 100% pure, poison-free fruits and food, directly from regenerated nature.
ecossistemaImpacto.pillar3Desc: Direct monthly financial remuneration for community members for each confirmed action.

coracao.subhead: Without pollinators, food production collapses. Every tree planted is a restored habitat.
coracao.quote: Regeneration is not just planting trees. It's rebuilding complete ecosystems.

impactoCascata.heading: Expanding tree coverage triggers cascading environmental recovery
impactoCascata.subhead: Planting a tree is not an isolated act — it's the trigger of a chain reaction that transforms the entire surrounding ecosystem.
impactoCascata.hex1Desc: More native flowers = more bees, butterflies and bats. Floral biodiversity is the foundation of the entire food chain.
impactoCascata.hex2Desc: Native fruit trees attract and feed bird species that disperse seeds, accelerating regeneration.
impactoCascata.hex3Desc: Urban vegetation cover reduces local temperature by up to 8°C, lowering energy consumption and saving lives.
impactoCascata.hex4Desc: Every tree filters fine particles, CO₂ and volatile compounds. Urban forests are permanent natural purifiers.
impactoCascata.hex5Desc: Deep roots break compaction, create water channels and feed microbes that rebuild fertility.
impactoCascata.ctaCardDesc: Planting one tree triggers all these processes simultaneously.
impactoCascata.quoteEn: Every fruit consumed should return to the soil.
impactoCascata.quotePt: Every fruit consumed should return to the soil — EcoDrones Community

seedMovement.heading: From fruit back to forest
seedMovement.body: The Seed Movement transforms isolated consumers into active participants in an expanding ecosystem. Every fruit you consume carries the next forest within it.
seedMovement.quoteEn: Every fruit consumed should return to the soil.
seedMovement.step3Desc: Isolated consumers become active participants... Every seed reinvested accelerates the 100 million tree goal.
seedMovement.step4Desc: The forest self-expands. Every adult tree produces hundreds of seeds per year, exponentially multiplying the original impact.
seedMovement.footer: ∞ The cycle feeds itself — more fruit, more seed, more forest

tecnologia.body: Specialized aerial seeding equipment, capable of reaching hard-to-access areas and planting with speed and precision far beyond manual planting.

engenharia.spec1Desc: Two articulated mechanical arms with cutting clamp and integrated collection net.
engenharia.spec2Desc: Computer vision + integrated GPS for precise identification of the ideal harvesting point.
engenharia.spec3Desc: Internally stabilized basket with shock absorption for transport without damage to harvested produce.
engenharia.spec4Desc: Proximity sensors + propeller guards for safe operation near vegetation.
engenharia.spec5Desc: Crab-inspired claws — precise cut at the peduncle, zero crushing, zero branch damage.

tecnologiaSemente.body: Each seed is high-performance biological hardware, prepared with 3 protective layers to survive aerial launch and ensure maximum germination.
tecnologiaSemente.layer1Desc: Defense against predators and prolonged structural nutrition. Outer layer that protects during transport and launch.
tecnologiaSemente.layer2Desc: Antibiotic protection and potent rooting base. Aloe vera, garlic, cinnamon, pepper and baking soda.
tecnologiaSemente.layer3Desc: Vital core with the native seed. The heart of the protocol — preserved genetic material for maximum germination.
tecnologiaSemente.quote: The Shielding Protocol ensures the seed survives rodents, weather and fungi until ideal germination.

protocolo.step01Desc: 5 natural ingredients that create a biological armor for the seed:
protocolo.steps2and3Desc: Hardening process that guarantees 4+ months durability:
protocolo.min1Desc: 200g starch + 100g basalt powder — coat the seeds uniformly
protocolo.min2Desc: Dry in a ventilated place, away from direct sunlight, to preserve properties
protocolo.min3Desc: Refrigerator for 24h — guarantees 4+ months durability and activates resistance
protocolo.resultText: Seeds with 4+ months durability, resistant to rodents, weather, fungi and aerial launch impact.

janelaOuro.subhead: When the App crosses two critical variables with the mapped area, the drone army is automatically activated.
janelaOuro.leftDesc: Avoids the intense gravitational pull of the moon on the seeds and soil, increasing the initial root fixation rate.
janelaOuro.centerDesc: Drone army automatically activated for planting mission
janelaOuro.rightDesc: Moist soil after rain creates the ideal moisture bed for immediate germination and deep root penetration without artificial irrigation.
janelaOuro.result: Result: Germination rate up to 3x higher than common manual planting, with zero use of artificial irrigation.

mapeamento.step1Desc: Algorithm crosses soil, climate, altitude and native flora data to identify species with the highest chance of success.
mapeamento.step2Desc: Only seeds perfectly adapted to the local ecosystem are selected, ensuring synergy with existing fauna and flora.
mapeamento.step3Desc: Exact coordinates for surgical launch at each map point, maximizing coverage and minimizing waste.

infraestrutura.subhead: EcoDrones Community is applied environmental engineering with scale and precision.
infraestrutura.quoteBlock: ECODRONES COMMUNITY is applied environmental engineering with scale and precision.

sistemaPlantio.heading: From drone to soil: every centimeter mapped
sistemaPlantio.subhead: EcoDrones' planting system combines ballistic precision, geospatial intelligence and real-time validation to ensure every seed is planted in the right place at the right time.
sistemaPlantio.step1Desc: Drones fire encapsulated seeds in clay and nutrient biodrones at an AI-calculated pressure and angle for maximum soil penetration.
sistemaPlantio.step2Desc: Each planting point is recorded in GPS coordinates with metadata: species, date, climate conditions and germination probability.
sistemaPlantio.step3Desc: AI confirms the planting by computer vision and the user receives immediate credit in the app upon completing each validated mission.
sistemaPlantio.step4Desc: Drone swarms work in formation to cover large areas with maximum efficiency, respecting the ideal density per biome.
sistemaPlantio.footer: ∞ Each completed mission advances the goal: 100 Million Trees

appEcoDrones.subhead: Three integrated systems that transform every planting action into income, impact and knowledge.
appEcoDrones.card1Desc: Monthly payment validated for each digitally confirmed planting action. The more you plant, the more you receive.
appEcoDrones.card2Desc: Green asset management with biome analysis. 100% biological compatibility — only seeds perfectly adapted to the local ecosystem.
appEcoDrones.card3Desc: Integrated circular economy for trading and selling seeds, bio-inputs and harvest products. A community that produces and consumes.

cerebro.subhead: Computer vision applied to intelligent harvesting — efficiency with environmental responsibility.
cerebro.quote: Applied Artificial Intelligence: Efficiency with responsibility.
cerebro.feature1Desc: Precisely identifies the exact harvesting moment for maximum nutritional quality.
cerebro.feature2Desc: Multispectral camera detects pigmentation and fruit development stage.
cerebro.feature3Desc: Algorithm identifies spots, fungi and infestations before they compromise the harvest.
cerebro.feature4Desc: Selects only ready fruits, preserving the others for natural maturation.

seguranca.heading: Flying safely is as important as planting
seguranca.subhead: 5 integrated safety layers ensure every mission happens without incidents, protecting the drone, the pilot and the ecosystem.
seguranca.item1Desc: Real-time battery monitoring system with automatic return when a critical level is detected.
seguranca.item2Desc: Load sensors ensure the drone never exceeds its maximum operational capacity.
seguranca.item3Desc: Return-to-Home protocol activated by signal loss, wind above limit or critical battery.
seguranca.item4Desc: Soft emergency landing system with automatic recording of drone position and status.
seguranca.item5Desc: Fully autonomous operation via AI or manual control by certified remote pilot.

modeloEconomico.heading: 6 sources of sustainable revenue
modeloEconomico.body: EcoDrones' economic model combines environmental impact with sustainable financial viability, ensuring that every tree planted generates value for the entire chain.
modeloEconomico.source1Desc: Each tree planted generates certified credits sold in the voluntary and regulated market.
modeloEconomico.source2Desc: Companies sponsor planting missions as socio-environmental responsibility actions.
modeloEconomico.source3Desc: Commercialization of planting and harvesting drones for farmers and cooperatives.
modeloEconomico.source4Desc: Line of sustainable products linked to the EcoDrones Community brand.
modeloEconomico.source5Desc: Contracts with farmers for automated planting and harvesting mission execution.
modeloEconomico.source6Desc: Licensing the drone management platform to other reforestation organizations.

parceriasESG.heading: Your company, real impact
parceriasESG.body: Transform your ESG goals into concrete actions. Sponsor planting missions, monitor impact in real time and receive certified reports for your stakeholders.
parceriasESG.flow1: Company defines carbon or tree goal
parceriasESG.result1Desc: International certification of carbon sequestered by trees planted in validated missions.
parceriasESG.result2Desc: Complete documentation of number of trees, species planted and reforested area.
parceriasESG.result3Desc: Certified contribution to Sustainable Development Goals 13, 15 and 17.
parceriasESG.result4Desc: Presence on the EcoDrones platform with regenerative partner seal.
parceriasESG.extra1Desc: Companies sponsor exclusive fleets with corporate livery. Their drones, their brand, their impact measured in real time.
parceriasESG.extra2Desc: Active users with missions above minimum receive physical products from the partner. Sustainable branding in the real world.
parceriasESG.extra3Desc: Users who post about planting on social media with the partner company hashtag earn automatic extra payments.
parceriasESG.cta: I want to be an ESG partner →

engajamento.heading: A community that acts together
engajamento.body: The EcoDrones app connects planters, biologists, pilots and supporters in a gamified digital ecosystem. Every action contributes to the 100 million tree goal.
engajamento.feature1Desc: Identify degraded areas and contribute geolocated data for planting missions.
engajamento.feature2Desc: Receive personalized missions based on your local biome and planting history.
engajamento.feature3Desc: Internal marketplace for seed exchange and donation between community members.
engajamento.feature4Desc: Participate in exclusive draws linked to your planting and validation actions.
engajamento.feature5Desc: Acquire your planting drone directly through the app with community financing.
engajamento.feature6Desc: Connect with planters, biologists and pilots from across Brazil in real time.

educacional.heading: The app that teaches while you plant
educacional.body: Each planting mission comes with contextual educational content. You learn about the local ecosystem while contributing to regenerate it.
educacional.quote: Regenerating without education is like planting without understanding the soil. Our app trains the planter of the future.
educacional.lesson1Desc: Learn which native plants have therapeutic properties and how to harvest them sustainably.
educacional.lesson2Desc: Understand the nutritional composition of the foods you plant and their health benefits.
educacional.lesson3Desc: Master the germination process: temperature, humidity, substrate and time for each species.
educacional.lesson4Desc: Visualize how roots interact with the soil, retain water and create underground nutrient networks.
educacional.lesson5Desc: Understand how ecological succession restores biomes and why each species matters.
educacional.lesson6Desc: Know the exact moment to harvest each fruit without harming the plant's future growth.
educacional.lesson7Desc: Use meteorological data and phenology to optimize planting in seasonal golden windows.

impacto.heading: Plant 100 million trees.
impacto.body1: Our goal is clear and measurable: use drones to plant 100 million native trees in degraded areas across Brazil and the world.
impacto.body2: We are at the beginning of the journey. Every supporter, every pilot and every donation brings us closer to the goal. The regenerative revolution starts now.

embaixadores.richardDesc: Environmental Ambassador committed to planetary regeneration. National reference in conservation of Brazilian biodiversity.

comunidade.subhead: The more you plant, the more recognition you earn — and the more you receive in monthly payments.
comunidade.carbonDesc: Every planted and validated tree generates certified carbon credits. Planting volume = credit volume. Your impact is measurable and monetizable.
comunidade.carbonLoop: ∞ More planting → more credits → more income
comunidade.premiumDesc: Complete 2 or more missions per day to activate the accelerated tier with a percentage bonus on your credits. Consistency is rewarded exponentially.
comunidade.rankingDisclaimer: * Illustrative data — ranking updated in real time in the app
comunidade.levelSub: Each level increases your monthly payments

apoie.subhead: Every tree planted is a regenerated life. Goal: 100 million trees.
apoie.path1Desc: Support directly via Brazil's most trusted crowdfunding platform.
apoie.path2Desc: Donate any amount now. Instant and free transfer.
apoie.path3Desc: Donate with cryptocurrency simply and securely through the Bankei platform.
apoie.alloc1Desc: Acquisition and processing of the shielding protocol

parceiros.bankeiDesc: Payments processed by Bankei — the financial platform that connects communities to their rewards simply, safely and for free.

receba.body: The system automatically validates each planting action and processes your monthly payment directly on the Bankei platform — no bureaucracy.
receba.step1Desc: Execute planting missions with drones or contribute with seeds and resources
receba.step2Desc: The app confirms each action with geolocation, photo and timestamp
receba.step3Desc: Monthly payment directly to your Bankei account — free to open
receba.cta: Open your Bankei account for free →
receba.disclaimer: 100% free account · Monthly payments guaranteed · No bureaucracy

manifestoPDF.heading: Download the Project Documents
manifestoPDF.subhead: Three complete documents about the vision, technology and business model of EcoDrones Community — in Portuguese and English.
manifestoPDF.pdf1Desc: The founding vision of EcoDrones Community: why planting 100 million trees is economically viable and environmentally urgent.
manifestoPDF.pdf2Desc: Complete technical infrastructure: planting and harvesting drones, AI system, economic model and expansion roadmap.
manifestoPDF.pdf3Desc: The English technical edition: bio-inspired engineering, precision harvesting, seed dispersion mechanics and the cascade impact model.
manifestoPDF.footerStrip: Free documentation to share · Goal 100 Million Trees · EcoDrones Community

fundador.body: Full-stack developer specialized in agritech and regenerative systems. Creator of EcoDrones Community and the Holgrow platform. Believes that technology and nature are inseparable allies.
fundador.cardQuote: We don't need to wait for the government or big corporations. We need people willing to get their hands dirty — with technology, with seeds and with purpose.

visaoFinal.body: Fewer floods, less erosion, fewer deaths. More biodiversity, more abundance, more future for our children's children.
visaoFinal.scale1Desc: Hundreds of drones flying in simultaneous formation, covering dozens of hectares per mission. The scale the planet needs.
visaoFinal.scale2Desc: Mass harvest events in cities: communities gather to harvest the fruits of urban planting and distribute locally.
visaoFinal.scale3Desc: Part of each harvest is automatically directed to schools, hospitals and charitable institutions in planting areas.
visaoFinal.finalBlock: ECODRONES COMMUNITY is a regenerative infrastructure.
visaoFinal.finalMeta: Goal: 100 Million Trees · Automated Drone Planting · Green Technology

doacaoCripto.heading: Donate with Crypto, plant Forests
doacaoCripto.subhead: Direct transfer to our wallet — no intermediaries, no extra fees.
doacaoCripto.motivational1: Every donation plants seeds of hope 🌱
doacaoCripto.motivational2: Your support goes directly to planting native trees.
doacaoCripto.howTo2: 2. Scan the QR Code or copy the address
doacaoCripto.howTo3: 3. Send any amount directly from your wallet
doacaoCripto.howTo4: 4. Done! Your donation goes to planting 🌳
